# Lunexo Media

Lunexo Media is a premier digital marketing and AI automation agency headquartered in New York, NY, serving clients worldwide including the USA and Australia.

## Core Services
1. Custom Website Design & Development: Blazing-fast, SEO-optimized websites built for conversions.
2. Local SEO & Content Marketing: Helping local businesses (dentists, med spas, chiropractors) rank on Google Page 1.
3. Google & Meta Ads Management: Data-driven paid ad campaigns to scale revenue and generate high-quality leads.
4. AI Automation & Voice Agents: Custom AI chatbots (text) and voice assistants (Vapi) for 24/7 customer support and automated appointment booking.
5. Email & Workflow Automation: Streamlining business operations with intelligent automated workflows.

## Target Audience & Niches
We specialize in helping local businesses, service providers, and e-commerce brands scale. Key niches include:
- Dental Clinics
- Medical Spas
- Chiropractors
- Home Service Businesses
- E-commerce Brands

- Founder & CEO: Farhan Tanvier

- Track Record: 50+ projects completed, 10x ROI track record.
